MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:Attorney Patrick Fenham for Bannam Place, LLC A California Limited Liability Company the moving party/ Attorney Douglass Applegate for John Sollner the opposing party.

After having discussions regarding DEFENDANT BANNAM PLACE, LLC, and WB COYLE's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. The Court's ruling stands as follows:
GRANTED. Defendants must file answers no later than December 3, 2013 by 4 p.m. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants BANNAM PLACE, LLC'S and WB COYLE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on December 3, 2013, at 9:30 am. See San Francisco Local Rule 8.10. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
